entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Allotetraploid peanut (Arachis hypogaea L.) used in biotechnology improvement studies

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The application of scientific techniques to improve crop characteristics

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL MARKERS
entities.description: Markers based on seed proteins and isozymes used to study polymorphism

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism, a type of DNA marker

entities.name: RAPD
entities.description: Random Amplified Polymorphic DNA, a type of DNA marker

entities.name: STMS
entities.description: Sequence-tagged microsatellite markers used to reveal genetic variation

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple-sequence repeats, a type of genetic marker identified using genomic libraries

entities.name: PSTI
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used to construct genomic libraries for SSR identification

entities.name: SAU3AI/BAMHI
entities.description: Restriction enzymes used to construct genomic libraries for SSR identification

entities.name: REPEAT MOTIF
entities.description: Recurring nucleotide sequences that characterize SSRs

entities.name: ATT MOTIF
entities.description: A specific repeat motif representing 29% of identified SSRs with high polymorphism

entities.name: GA MOTIF
entities.description: A specific repeat motif representing 28% of identified SSRs with high polymorphism

entities.name: AT MOTIF
entities.description: A specific repeat motif showing the maximum number of alleles per locus

entities.name: CTT MOTIF
entities.description: A specific repeat motif identified in the peanut genome

entities.name: GT MOTIF
entities.description: A specific repeat motif identified in the peanut genome

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The occurrence of multiple forms of a gene or marker within a population

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in gene frequencies among different landraces of peanut
